verses.geez:
ወበጽሑ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ተዓይኒሆሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ዘ[ፂን] ፡ በቀዳሚ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ ወነበረ ፡ ሕዝብ
                  ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቃዴስ ፡ ወሞተት ፡ በህየ ፡ ማርያም ፡ ወተቀብረት ፡ ህየ ።

translations.lxx: And the children of Israel, even the whole congregation, came into the wilderness of Sin, in the first month, and the people abode in Cades; and Mariam died there, and was buried there.
translations.kjv: Then came the children of Israel, even the whole congregation, into the desert of Zin in the first month: and the people abode in Kadesh; and Miriam died there, and was buried there.

verses.geez: ወኦልቦቱ ፡ ማየ ፡ ለትዕይንት ፡ ወተጋብኡ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወላዕለ ፡ አሮን ።

translations.lxx: And there was no water for the congregation: and they gathered themselves together against Moses and Aaron.
translations.kjv: And there was no water for the congregation: and they gathered themselves together against Moses and against Aaron.

verses.geez: ወፀአልዎ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ ኀየሰነ ፡ ንሙት ፡ በሞተ ፡ አኀዊነ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And the people reviled Moses, saying, Would we had died in the destruction of our brethren before the Lord!
translations.kjv: And the people chode with Moses, and spake, saying, Would God that we had died when our brethren died before the LORD!

verses.geez: ወለምንት ፡ አውፃእክሙ ፡ ትዕይንቶ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ከመ ፡ ትቅትሉነ ፡ ወለእንስሳነሂ ።

translations.lxx: And wherefore have ye brought up the congregation of the Lord into this wilderness, to kill us and our cattle?
translations.kjv: And why have ye brought up the congregation of the LORD into this wilderness, that we and our cattle should die there?

verses.geez:
ወለምንት ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ዘአውፃእክሙነ ፡ እምነ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ከመ ፡ ታምጽኡነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ መካን ፡ እኩይ ፡ መካን ፡
                  ዘኢይዘ[ራ]እ ፡ ወዘአልቦ ፡ በለሰ ፡ ወአልቦቱ ፡ አዕጻደ ፡ ወይን ፡ ወአልቦ ፡ ሮማን ፡ ወአልቦ ፡ ማየ ፡ ለሰትይ ።

translations.lxx: And wherefore is this? Ye have brought us up out of Egypt, that we should come into this evil place; a place where there is no sowing, neither figs, nor vines, nor pomegranates, neither is there water to drink.
translations.kjv: And wherefore have ye made us to come up out of Egypt, to bring us in unto this evil place? it is no place of seed, or of figs, or of vines, or of pomegranates; neither is there any water to drink.

verses.geez:
ወመጽኡ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወአሮን ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጾሙ ፡ ለትዕይንት ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ፡ ወወድቁ ፡ በገጾሙ
                  ፡ ወአስተርአየ ፡ ስብሐተ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses and Aaron went from before the assembly to the door of the tabernacle of witness, and they fell upon their faces; and the glory of the Lord appeared to them.
translations.kjv: And Moses and Aaron went from the presence of the assembly unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation, and they fell upon their faces: and the glory of the LORD appeared unto them.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
ንሥኣ ፡ ለእንታክቲ ፡ በትር ፡ ወአስተጋብኡ ፡ ትዕይንተ ፡ አንተ ፡ ወአሮን ፡ እኁከ ፡ ወበልዋ ፡ ለኰኵሕ ፡ በቅድሜሆሙ
                  ፡ ወትሁብ ፡ ማያ ፡ ወታወፅኡ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ማየ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ኰኵሕ ፡ ወታሰትዩ ፡ ትዕይንተ ፡ ወእንስሳሆሙኒ ።

translations.lxx: Take thy rod, and call the assembly, thou and Aaron thy brother, and speak ye to the rock before them, and it shall give forth its waters; and ye shall bring forth for them water out of the rock, and give drink to the congregation and their cattle.
translations.kjv: Take the rod, and gather thou the assembly together, thou, and Aaron thy brother, and speak ye unto the rock before their eyes; and it shall give forth his water, and thou shalt bring forth to them water out of the rock: so thou shalt give the congregation and their beasts drink.

verses.geez: ወነሥአ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ በትር ፡ እንተ ፡ እምቅድሜሁ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዞ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And Moses took his rod which was before the Lord, as the Lord commanded.
translations.kjv: And Moses took the rod from before the LORD, as he commanded him.

verses.geez:
ወአስተጋብእዎሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወአሮን ፡ ለትዕይንት ፡ ቅድሜሃ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ኰኵሕ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ስምዑኒ ፡ ከሓድያን ፡ ቦኑ
                  ፡ እምነ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ኰኵሕ ፡ ናወፅእ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ማየ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses and Aaron assembled the congregation before the rock, and said to them, Hear me, ye disobedient ones; must we bring you water out of this rock?
translations.kjv: And Moses and Aaron gathered the congregation together before the rock, and he said unto them, Hear now, ye rebels; must we fetch you water out of this rock?

verses.geez:
ወአልዐለ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ወዘበጣ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ኰኵሕ ፡ በእንታክቲ ፡ በትር ፡ ካዕበ ፡ ወወፅአ ፡ ማይ ፡ ብዙኅ ፡
                  ወሰትዩ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ወእንሳሆሙኒ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses lifted up his hand and struck the rock with his rod twice; and much water came forth, and the congregation drank, and their cattle.
translations.kjv: And Moses lifted up his hand, and with his rod he smote the rock twice: and the water came out abundantly, and the congregation drank, and their beasts also.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወለአሮን ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢአመንክሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትቀድሱኒ ፡ ቅድሜሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡
                  እስራኤል ፡ በበይነ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ኢታበውእዎሙ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ለዛቲ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ አነ ፡ ወሀብክዎሙ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses and Aaron, Because ye have not believed me to sanctify me before the children of Israel, therefore ye shall not bring this congregation into the land which I have given them.
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses and Aaron, Because ye believed me not, to sanctify me in the eyes of the children of Israel, therefore ye shall not bring this congregation into the land which I have given them.

verses.geez: ወዝንተ ፡ ማይ ፡ ዘቅስት ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እስመ ፡ ተዋቀሱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: This is the water of Strife, because the children of Israel spoke insolently before the Lord, and he was sanctified in them.
translations.kjv: This is the water of Meribah; because the children of Israel strove with the LORD, and he was sanctified in them.

verses.geez:
ወፈነወ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ መላእክተ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቃዴስ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ኤዶም ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይብል ፡ ከመዝአ ፡ ይቤአ ፡ እኁከአ
                  ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ለሊከ ፡ ታአምር ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ሕማመነ ፡ ዘረከብነ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses sent messengers from Cades to the king of Edom, saying, Thus says thy brother Israel; Thou knowest all the distress that has come upon us.
translations.kjv: And Moses sent messengers from Kadesh unto the king of Edom, Thus saith thy brother Israel, Thou knowest all the travail that hath befallen us:

verses.geez:
ወወረዱ ፡ አበዊነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወነበሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ብዙኀ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ወሣቀዩነ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወለአበዊነሂ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And how our fathers went down into Egypt, and we sojourned in Egypt many days, and the Egyptians afflicted us and our fathers.
translations.kjv: How our fathers went down into Egypt, and we have dwelt in Egypt a long time; and the Egyptians vexed us, and our fathers:

verses.geez:
ወጸራኅነ ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወሰምዐ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ቃለነ ፡ ወፈነወ ፡ መልአኮ ፡ ወአውጽአነ ፡ እምነ ፡ ግብጽ
                  ፡ ወይእዜኒ ፡ ሀለውነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ቃደስ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደወለ ፡ ብሔርከ ።

translations.lxx: And we cried to the Lord, and the Lord heard our voice, and sent an angel and brought us out of Egypt; and now we are in the city of Cades, at the extremity of thy coasts.
translations.kjv: And when we cried unto the LORD, he heard our voice, and sent an angel, and hath brought us forth out of Egypt: and, behold, we are in Kadesh, a city in the uttermost of thy border:

verses.geez:
ወአኅልፈነ ፡ እንተ ፡ ምድርከ ፡ ወኢንኅልፍ ፡ እንተ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ገራኅት ፡ ወኢላዕለ ፡ አዕጻደ ፡ ወይን ፡ ወኢንሰቲ ፡
                  እምዐዘቃት ፡ ማየ ፤ ፍኖተ ፡ መጽያኅተ ፡ ነሐውር ፡ ወኢንትገሐሥ ፡ ኢለየማንአ ፡ ወኢለፀጋምአ ፡ እስከአ ፡ ነኀልፍአ ፡
                  እምደወልከአ ።

translations.lxx: We will pass through thy land: we will not go through the fields, nor through the vineyards, nor will we drink water out of thy cistern: we will go by the king's highway; we will not turn aside to the right hand or to the left, until we have passed thy borders.
translations.kjv: Let us pass, I pray thee, through thy country: we will not pass through the fields, or through the vineyards, neither will we drink of the water of the wells: we will go by the king’s high way, we will not turn to the right hand nor to the left, until we have passed thy borders.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ ኤዶም ፡ ኢተኀልፍአ ፡ እንተአ ፡ ላዕሌየ ፡ ወእመአኮሰአ ፡ ንትቃተልአ ፡ እወጽእ ፡ እትቀበልከአ ።

translations.lxx: And Edom said to him, Thou shalt not pass through me, and if otherwise, I will go forth to meet thee in war.
translations.kjv: And Edom said unto him, Thou shalt not pass by me, lest I come out against thee with the sword.

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እንተአ ፡ መንገለአ ፡ አድባር ፡ ንኅልፍ ፡ ወለእመኒ ፡ ሰተይነ ፡ እምነ ፡ ማይከ ፡
                  ንሕነ ፡ ወእንስሳነ ፡ ሤጦ ፡ ንሁበከ ፡ ወዝንቱሰ ፡ ኢኮነ ፡ ወኢምንተኒ ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ደብርአ ፡ ንኅልፍአ ።

translations.lxx: And the children of Israel say to him, We will pass by the mountain; and if I and my cattle drink of thy water, I will pay thee: but it is no matter of importance, we will go by the mountain.
translations.kjv: And the children of Israel said unto him, We will go by the high way: and if I and my cattle drink of thy water, then I will pay for it: I will only, without doing anything else, go through on my feet.

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ ኢትኅልፍአ ፡ እንተአ ፡ ላዕሌየአ ፤ ወወፅአ ፡ ኤዶም ፡ ተቀበሎ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ ክቡድ ፡ ወበእድ ፡ ጽንዕት
                  ።

translations.lxx: And he said, Thou shalt not pass through me; and Edom went forth to meet him with a great host, and a mighty hand.
translations.kjv: And he said, Thou shalt not go through. And Edom came out against him with much people, and with a strong hand.

verses.geez: ወኢፈቀደ ፡ ኤዶም ፡ የሀቦ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ምኅላፈ ፡ እንተ ፡ ደወሉ ፡ ወተግሕሰ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እምኔሁ ።

translations.lxx: So Edom refused to allow Israel to pass through his borders, and Israel turned away from him.
translations.kjv: Thus Edom refused to give Israel passage through his border: wherefore Israel turned away from him.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቃዴስ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ሆር ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Cades; and the children of Israel, even the whole congregation, came to Mount Or.
translations.kjv: And the children of Israel, even the whole congregation, journeyed from Kadesh, and came unto mount Hor.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወለአሮን ፡ በደብረ ፡ ሆር ፡ በመንገለ ፡ ደወለ ፡ ምድሩ ፡ ለኤዶም ፡ እንዘ ፡
                  ይብል ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses and Aaron in mount Or, on the borders of the land of Edom, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses and Aaron in mount Hor, by the coast of the land of Edom, saying,

verses.geez:
ለይትወሰክ ፡ አሮን ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሕዝቡ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢትበውኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ አነ ፡ ወሀብክዎሙ ፡
                  ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እስመ ፡ አምዓዕክሙኒ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ማየ ፡ ቅስት ።

translations.lxx: Let Aaron be added to his people; for ye shall certainly not go into the land which I have given the children of Israel, because ye provoked me at the water of strife.
translations.kjv: Aaron shall be gathered unto his people: for he shall not enter into the land which I have given unto the children of Israel, because ye rebelled against my word at the water of Meribah.

verses.geez: ንሥኦ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ወለእልዓዛር ፡ ወልዱ ፡ ወአዕርጎሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ሆር ፡ በቅድመ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ትዕይንት ።

translations.lxx: Take Aaron, and Eleazar his son, and bring them up to the mount Or before all the congregation;
translations.kjv: Take Aaron and Eleazar his son, and bring them up unto mount Hor:

verses.geez:
ወንሣእ ፡ አልባሲሁ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ እምላዕሌሁ ፡ ወአልብሶ ፡ ለአልዓዛር ፡ ወልዱ ፡ ወይትወሰክ ፡ አሮን ፡ ወይሙት ፡ በህየ
                  ።

translations.lxx: and take Aaron's apparel from off him, and put it on Eleazar his son: and let Aaron die there and be added to his people.
translations.kjv: And strip Aaron of his garments, and put them upon Eleazar his son: and Aaron shall be gathered unto his people, and shall die there.

verses.geez: ወገብረ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዞ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወአዕረጎሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ሆር ፡ በቅድመ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ትዕይንት ።

translations.lxx: And Moses did as the Lord commanded him, and took him up to mount Or, before all the congregation.
translations.kjv: And Moses did as the LORD commanded: and they went up into mount Hor in the sight of all the congregation.

verses.geez:
ወነሥአ ፡ አልባሲሁ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ እምላዕሌሁ ፡ ወአልበሶ ፡ ለእልዓዛር ፡ ወልዱ ፡ ወሞተ ፡ አሮን ፡ በውስተ ፡ ርእሰ ፡
                  ደብር ፡ ወወረዱ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወእልዓዛር ፡ እምነ ፡ ደብር ።

translations.lxx: And he took Aaron's garments off him, and put them on Eleazar his son, and Aaron died on the top of the mountain; and Moses and Eleazar came down from the mountain.
translations.kjv: And Moses stripped Aaron of his garments, and put them upon Eleazar his son; and Aaron died there in the top of the mount: and Moses and Eleazar came down from the mount.

verses.geez:
ወርእዩ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ከመ ፡ ሐለፈ ፡ አሮን ፡ ወበከይዎ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ፴መዋዕለ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ቤተ ፡ እስራኤል
                  ።

translations.lxx: And all the congregation saw that Aaron was dead: and they wept for Aaron thirty days, even all the house of Israel.
translations.kjv: And when all the congregation saw that Aaron was dead, they mourned for Aaron thirty days, even all the house of Israel.
